message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Cindy
Kristy
Hello!
Hi there.
Hehe
Um...
Yes?
Mm.
Umm.
Ah, I'm so sorry! I can't remember who you are!
Oh, that’s understandable. We’re meeting for the first time.
Hey.
Oh, is that so? If you had just told me that, it would have been fine.
Ah! So that means you're the famous detective, huh?
Ugh.
Famous is not quite right.
Wow.
! Oh my, how touching!
Hey!
Hoo! You’re not bored, are you?
I’m kind of bored and it's dull.
Hah.
Hey,
I'm sorry if they were being mean to you.
Look.
Talk.
Listen
End the conversation

It feels surprisingly lonely, doesn't it?
Yeah
I thought there’d be more people, though.
Right? I thought so too!
But I actually prefer it this calm rather than too crowded.
I agree, it might be nice and quiet.
Right? We can have a nice slow chat like this.
Right?
But it's a bit boring.
Finally, the seniors have arrived, and it's turned into quite a glamorous atmosphere.
Maybe this will distract us from the boredom a bit?
I hope so, but,
It's nothing like when we’re together.
Honestly, I don't really like these kinds of parties.
It's my first time acting in a movie, so I'm actually a bit confused.
I see, it's your debut, huh? Good luck!
Yeah, thanks! But, like, what's it gonna be like filming a movie?
It's kinda hard to understand.
What are you talking about?
Then you'll be fine.
Even if you say that...
Oh.
Mmm, I'm getting nervous!
My role is the daughter of the main character. I actually wanted to play Guy's sister, but things didn’t go as I hoped.
You should really skip the sister role for Guy.
Why? We're totally brother-sister material!
I wonder why you think that.
Geez, why can't you understand?
I'll do my best in the movie.
Looks like shooting will start in Manhattan, so I can probably commute from home.
Oh really?
Where are they filming?
I don't know.
I have no idea about that.
The set sounds like it might be chaotic. I mean, Meryl and Jennifer are both there.
Are they really that unfriendly?
This world is tough, you know.
I'll just do my best at what I can do.
Are you talking about the girl you came with?
Yeah, that's right.
You know, I'm a bit jealous of that girl.
Jealous? Why's that?
Uh, yeah.
It's still a secret.
Sorry!
So, how old are you? You're about the same age as me, right?
No, she's 20 years old.
What!? Is she really that old already? I can't believe it!
No way!
Oh wow, she's actually four years older than me.
I see.
I envy that.
But I guess it wouldn’t help to make a fuss about it.
She seems bright and totally unburdened by worries.
Yeah, she does look that way.
I wish I could act like that.
But it makes me a little envious.
What do you mean by acting like that?
Being able to do anything without hesitation.
Ah.
I want some freedom too.
The director's daughter.
Oh, you mean Patty! I like her, she's like an older sister.
I mentioned how I would be happy if Patty could be like an older sister since I'm an only child.
An older sister, huh?
So, did she agree to that?
Nope. She said it felt like too much pressure and turned me down.
I might have done something that upset Patty.
No way, I'm sure that’s not true.
Really? You think so? Patty is smart, so maybe my foolishness bothers her.
You’re probably worrying too much about it.
Really? You honestly think so?
I want to get along with Patty.
You know, I don’t have any friends. Everyone around me is an adult.
So, I was really looking forward to talking with Patty today.
But somehow, it feels like she’s avoiding me.
Isn't that just your imagination?
Ugh
Hmm, I really don't think it's just my imagination!
It's a chance to make friends, after all.
I won't give up; I'll give it a try!
Tonny Ford? I don't really know much about him.
Nope.
I see, that's too bad.
Are you looking into him or something?
Oh, no, it's not like that.
I just want to be of help somehow.
Sorry about that.
Oh, I remembered! Isn't he famous for being “forward with women’?
Right?!
If you yell that loud, he might hear you.
It's okay.
I kind of said to him,
my
if he laid a hand on me, I won’t let it slide.
I actually said that.
W-wow, that's something.
So bold, haha.
You probably shouldn't get too close to Tony.
Apparently, Jennifer got harassed by Tony, but she didn't tell me exactly what happened.
So, does that mean they don't get along?
Oh, aren’t you a little happy about this? You like Jennifer, right?
N-no, that's not it. I mean, we haven’t really talked much yet.
Kya
, you’re shy and cute, huh? Hehe.
You know, Tonny,
he might be at odds with Tomo. He might have all the women in the industry as enemies.
Hmm,
I wonder if he’s the one who thinks about me the most. Yeah, that’s the vibe.
Maintaining a good relationship with an agent is a fortunate environment, huh?
Ah
, really?
Yeah, I suppose you could say that. It’s just that,
I don’t want to express that in the word 'agent'.
Oh, sorry. Then what kind of person is she to you?
Hmm.
Well,
maybe like an older sister?
Older sister?
Ah.
, that might be a bit off.
Ugh.
I really can’t quite figure it out.
She’s a nice person, but there’s one thing that bothers me.
Something that bothers you?
Her supervision is strict,
and I hate feeling constrained.
I just wish she could be a little more understanding.
You know, when I come back after talking to someone, she asks me everything about what we talked about.
It really gets to me.
That’s some serious guard you’ve got there.
Honestly, I think if she put that energy into world domination, she'd conquer the world easily.
Even now I can feel
her gaze on my back.
Jennifer and I are really close, but for some reason, everyone finds that surprising. I wonder why?
Maybe it’s because it’s a combination of a pure idol who’s currently in the spotlight and a sexy actress?
That description sounds a bit outdated.
But that’s probably what it is.
People think Jennifer is selling sex, but she’s really not that kind of woman.
She’s a much purer person than I appear to be.
Those who say bad things about Jennifer are just jealous of her.
Meryl, she purposely arrived late to make a statement. I wonder what that lady is thinking.
That's really cutting.
It's just that she looks at me with such a scary face. When I went to greet her, she had a smiling expression, but her eyes weren’t smiling.
It was really, really scary.
I didn’t dislike Meryl, but somehow, I seem to have been disliked instead.
In any world, older women are hard to deal with. Just because I'm young, it makes her jealous.
Doesn’t the director feel like a dad?
He certainly has a commanding presence.
Right? I couldn’t help but call him Papa!
The director said I could become a wonderful actress. But,
what do you think?
Then I’m sure you’ll thrive as an actress.
Really?　But,
but you know,
I’m a little unsure. Until now, I’ve only done easy work like modeling.
But acting really measures your skill, doesn’t it? That’s tough.
You’ll be fine,
so you’ll surely do great.
I hope so.
Do you think the director's judgment is accurate?
Meryl is the director’s mistress, right? That’s fine, but when I said I called him Papa, I got a scary face.
To Meryl?
Yes. When I told that to the director, he laughed out loud.
Actually, the director even patted my bottom. Saying something like that,
would be bad, right?
Ugh.
Well, for now,
if you can hold it in, I think it’s better to keep it a secret.
Okay, let’s do that!
Even if he’s the director, he’s just a man.
Gai is totally muscle-bound.
He's technically an athlete, you know.
Technically, huh?
If you say it like that, he's gonna get mad.
Hehehe.
I find it weird that he can be in a movie.
Oh no, you really say such terrible things, even though you're friends.
You know, Gai hugged me tightly the first time we met.
He got really angry after that.
That's Gai's fault! What kind of rude thing was he doing?
Is that really such a bad thing? I didn't mind it though.
I thought maybe it would be like this if there was an older brother.
Oh, an older brother.
Yeah, it's like the vibe of an older brother.
Right? He's quite the strong older brother.
Guy and I feel like siblings, right?
Turns out Guy was quite the flirt, huh? I'm a bit disappointed.
I don't think so, though.
No way, that definitely seems flirtatious. It's nice that he's cheerful, but maybe he just really likes women.
I really don't get Guy.
Isn't San Guy's fiancée?
Yeah, that's right.
So that means she's like my older sister, huh?
Then it makes me feel almost like Guy's little sister.
I'd be happy if that were the case.
That's what I think, since I'm an only child.
If it’s an older brother, I can be that for you.
Yeah.
W-well, something like that.
It’s fine by me.
I wished that I could be born a,
an intelligent beauty like you.
Being born so cute is such a luxury.
But...
They say that’s synonymous with being a fool. That’s not something to be happy about.
The reason they say that is because,
they’re jealous of you. It’s because they don’t have that kind of talent.
It falls under that category.
That might be true, but I still don’t like it.
So Guy was into smart beauties like that, huh?
Hey, you seem a bit down.
Were you always the quiet type?
Hmm, no.
Just a bit right now.
Huff.
Oh right, it seems you haven't talked much with Guy either.
I hope you feel better soon.
Do you know about the serial murder case?
Well? I'm the type who doesn't keep up with worldly events.
Is someone shutting you out?
They’re surely protecting you.
Sorry, I don’t know anything.
※※※ It's a bug. ※※※
